title.en: Pinchas: Zealotry, Leadership Transitions, and the Daughters of Tzelafchad
title.zh: 品哈斯妥拉分篇：狂热、领导层过渡和泽罗法哈德的女儿们
title.he: פינחס: קנאות, מעבר מנהיגות ובנות צלפחד

description.en: Three powerful stories in one parsha — and what they teach about courage, succession planning, and women's rights in Torah.
description.zh: 一个妥拉分篇中的三个强有力的故事——以及它们关于勇气、继任规划和妥拉中妇女权利的教导。
description.he: שלושה סיפורים עוצמתיים בפרשה אחת — ומה הם מלמדים על אומץ, תכנון ירושה וזכויות נשים בתורה.

author: Torah Light Team
themes: Women's legal rights in ancient times
practical_applications: When to take a moral stand
Balancing individual action with community welfare
dall_e_prompt: A traditional Chinese shan shui (山水) style landscape depicting three distinct scenes woven together: In the foreground, a solitary figure stands boldly on a mountain peak, representing righteous courage. In the middle ground, an elderly sage passes a staff to a younger leader beneath ancient pine trees, symbolizing the transfer of wisdom and authority. In the distant background, five graceful figures in flowing robes approach a grand pavilion, representing the daughters seeking justice. The composition uses soft ink washes in earth tones (grey, brown, sepia) with subtle gold accents on the pavilion and staff. Misty clouds separate the three narrative elements, creating a contemplative, interconnected mood that speaks to courage, transition, and justice.
